About

Luis Vega

Luis Vega, known as MrCameraJunkie, is a content creator, livestream host, and educator focused on helping creators improve their video and audio production.

For more than five years he has hosted a weekly livestream dedicated to cameras, livestreaming, podcasting, and creator workflows. His content focuses on practical tools, gear, and techniques that help creators produce better content without unnecessary complexity.

Luis's audience consists primarily of creators, livestreamers, podcasters, and digital professionals building their online presence.
